subject: fix(debug): add re-entrancy guard, replay pre-React errors, remove unused import
body:
Three issues found during self-review:

1. Console interception could infinite-loop if debugLog itself triggered
   console.error — added re-entrancy guard with try/finally.
2. Pre-React errors (window.__debugErrors from inline script) were never
   replayed into the structured debug log — now replayed at module load
   with 'pre-react' source tag, then cleared.
3. getEntries import was unused in DebugPill.jsx after subscriber replay
   eliminated the need for direct reads — removed.

Tags: debug, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
